$comment: Design token file for the Carousel Dot Indicator component
$description: A single position indicator pip for a carousel. Comes in two styles (Dot — a square pip, Line — a wide pill), three sizes (sm/md/lg), three colour themes (Primary/Secondary/Tertiary), and two states (current = active slide, inactive = all other slides). The Primary inactive state uses mix-blend-multiply so the pip blends correctly when rendered over a photographic slide image. Used individually or composed into a Carousel Dot Group.

size.description: Width and height of the sm dot pip
Width and height of the md dot pip
Width and height of the lg dot pip

width.description: Width of the sm line pip

height.description: Height of the sm line pip

border-radius.description: Rounded ends on the sm line pip

width.description: Width of the md line pip

height.description: Height of the md line pip

border-radius.description: Rounded ends on the md line pip- 4px

width.description: Width of the lg line pip

height.description: Height of the lg line pip

border-radius.description: Rounded ends on the lg line pip- 6px

current.description: Deep primary blue fill for the active slide indicator- blue/700 - #004eeb

inactive.description: Very light gray for inactive pips; apply mix-blend-multiply so the pip blends over photographic slide backgrounds- gray/100 - #f2f4f7

inactive-blend-mode.description: CSS mix-blend-mode applied to Primary inactive pips only — allows pips to remain visible when overlaid on coloured or photographic content

current.description: Dark gray fill for the active indicator in Secondary theme- gray/600 - #475467

inactive.description: Light gray for inactive pips in Secondary theme- gray/300 - #d0d5dd

current.description: Mid gray fill for the active indicator in Tertiary theme- gray/400 - #98a2b3

inactive.description: Very light gray for inactive pips in Tertiary theme (no blend-mode required)- gray/100 - #f2f4f7
